objective: Wire compiler input, semantic unit inventory, conservation report, and FINAL_DRD assembly for the Tiny Brief Intake fixture.
implemented_capabilities: Closed compiler input bundle with approved semantic artifacts, operational indexes, review decisions, P2 spec lock, validator evidence, schemas, stage order, section order, semantic content hash, and current hash drift bindings.
Atomic compiler semantic unit inventory with 33 units across DRD-01, DRD-02, DRD-03, DRD-03B, and DRD-04.
Compiler conservation package validator that re-runs deterministic compilation and compares FINAL_DRD.md, semantic unit inventory, and conservation report against the same bundle.

Compiler validation requires semantic_content_hash, list-shaped input record groups, current_hashes coverage for every bundled input record, approval/review references for semantic artifacts, resolved unique section semantic_unit_ids, unique section IDs within each stage, and unique section ordering slots.
FINAL_DRD.md assembled deterministically from approved semantic unit sections with source hash attribution and stable stage order.
Conservation report showing no added units, no omitted units, no hash drift, no unapproved inputs, and PASS status.

deferred_due_scope.item: Final review manifest, hash index, reference index, and final review decision
deferred_due_scope.reason: P2-IMPL-05 owns DRD-06 final review input artifacts after P2-IMPL-04 compiler outputs are approved.
Build lock is a separate lock step after implementation candidates and reviews are ready.
